product_code: NDC Code of the procedure. Use this column as foreign key to map to the Rx data table
regimen: Name of the drug. Use this when user asks for drug names contains Treatment regimens (CDK, DATROWAY, ENHERTU, FULVESTRANT, GEMZAR, HALAVEN, HER2 POSITIVE DRUGS, ITOVEBI, ORSERDU, OTHER CHEMO, OTHER HORMONAL, OTHER SINGLE CHEMO, OTHER TARGETED, PD-1/PD-L1 BASED, PLATINUM BASED, TAXANE, TRODELVY, VINORELBINE, XELODA)
brand_name: Contains the brand name of the regimen
drug_class: Drug class which is lower level classification of drug name compared to regimen
type: Contains type of drug: 'oral' or 'IV' or 'Oral/IV'
bc_market: Flag indicating if the drug is a part of breast cancer market or not contains values 'Y' or 'N'
tnbc_market: Flag indicating if the drug is a part of TNBC market basket or not contains values 'Y' or 'N'
hr+her2-_market: Flag indicating if the drug is a part of HR+/HER2-/mHR market basket or not contains values 'Y' or 'N'
